title: 💎 Get Red Glass Gel Icons
content:
Retexture the image attached based on the JSON below 
{
  "style": "photorealistic 3D render",
  "material": "translucent glass-gel hybrid",
  "surface_texture": "smooth, glossy with soft bevels",
  "lighting": {
    "type": "studio HDRI",
    "intensity": "high",
    "direction": "angled top-left key light and ambient fill",
    "accent_colors": ["deep red", "bright orange", "white"],
    "reflections": true,
    "refractions": true,
    "dispersion_effects": true,
    "bloom": true
  },
  "color_scheme": {
    "primary": "deep red glass",
    "secondary": "orange inner glow",
    "highlights": "white light accents",
    "rim_light": "soft orange edge lighting"
  },
  "background": {
    "color": "pure black",
    "vignette": true,
    "texture": "none"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "chromatic_aberration": true,
    "glow": true,
    "high_contrast": true,
    "color_emphasis": ["red", "orange"],
    "sharpness": "high",
    "clarity": "crisp and reflective",
    "floating_effect": "soft glow below each object with subtle shadow blur"
  },
  "camera": {
    "angle": "isometric or straight-on top view",
    "focus": "centered composition",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow for soft background fade"
  },
  "composition": {
    "layout": "symmetrical, grid-like",
    "spacing": "even with air gaps between objects",
    "reflection": "none",
    "ground_contact": false,
    "floating": true,
    "shadow": "soft drop shadow directly below each object with blur to indicate lift"
  }
}

title: 🪞 Get Transparent Glass Icons
content:
Retexture the image attached based on the JSON below 
{
  "style": "photorealistic",
  "material": "glass",
  "background": "plain white",
  "object_position": "centered",
  "lighting": "soft, diffused studio lighting",
  "camera_angle": "eye-level, straight-on",
  "resolution": "high",
  "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
  "details": {
    "reflections": true,
    "shadows": false,
    "transparency": true
  }
}
